name: Pilot Operations Control
recommendedUse: Use after v2.6 Private Pilot Readiness approval to rehearse run-day operations without exposing real member, contact, access-need, payment, official Toastmasters, meeting-link, or authority records in the public demo.
safetyRule: Pilot operations controls are public templates only. No real membership, address, phone, email, access-need, official application, Toastmasters member-number, payment, signature, private organisation contact, meeting link, incident detail, or real authority data belongs in the public demo, public repository, public screenshots, or fake-data Decidim sandbox.
runDayRule: Operate only after v2.6 readiness approval and keep all real private records in a separate approved private environment with role access, incident response, official handoff, retention, deletion, and closeout evidence.

operationsChecks.title: Run authority confirmed
operationsChecks.evidence: Named start pause close authority recorded

operationsChecks.title: No-public-data reminder read
operationsChecks.evidence: Start-of-day note confirms public package remains fake only
operationsChecks.stop_condition: Team shares real records in public channels

operationsChecks.title: Private intake notice active
operationsChecks.evidence: Notice explains purpose fields access retention deletion and official handoff
operationsChecks.stop_condition: Participant submits private details without notice

operationsChecks.title: Fake IDs only in public evidence
operationsChecks.evidence: Screenshots exports and reports use fake IDs only
operationsChecks.stop_condition: Public evidence shows names contact or access needs

operationsChecks.title: Consent and withdrawal route live
operationsChecks.evidence: Participant can change track withdraw or ask what is stored

operationsChecks.title: Access support route private
operationsChecks.evidence: Access needs go to named support role only
operationsChecks.stop_condition: Access needs shared with organisation supporters

operationsChecks.title: Toastmasters handoff external
operationsChecks.evidence: Applications signatures roster and member numbers stay outside public package
operationsChecks.stop_condition: Official forms stored in Governance Commons public files

operationsChecks.title: Sponsorship status external
operationsChecks.evidence: Only approved status summary can be recorded
operationsChecks.stop_condition: Fee card receipt or bank detail enters Governance Commons

operationsChecks.title: Admin access removal tested
operationsChecks.evidence: Admin removal and role review are rehearsed

operationsChecks.title: Incident clock ready
operationsChecks.evidence: Triage owner containment path and notification route exist

operationsChecks.title: Redaction export checked
operationsChecks.evidence: Export sample strips private fields before publication

operationsChecks.title: Correction request route rehearsed
operationsChecks.evidence: Participant correction request has owner and decision log
operationsChecks.stop_condition: Correction request handled in public comments

operationsChecks.title: Deletion date set
operationsChecks.evidence: Pilot end date retention period export and deletion owner recorded

operationsChecks.title: Public wording reviewed
operationsChecks.evidence: Update says sample or proposed club where appropriate
operationsChecks.stop_condition: Public wording implies charter acceptance or official membership

operationsChecks.title: Daily checkpoint recorded
operationsChecks.evidence: Start pause continue or close decision is recorded

operationsChecks.title: Post-pilot deletion proof planned
operationsChecks.evidence: Deletion export and retained evidence plan exists

participantStateRules.allowed_record: Minimal private contact if notice approved
participantStateRules.stop_condition: Demo attendee is counted as founder

participantStateRules.allowed_record: Track choice and handoff status only
participantStateRules.stop_condition: Official application copied into public package

participantStateRules.allowed_record: Support role and referral note only
Support need to named role only
participantStateRules.stop_condition: Access need appears in screenshot or CSV

participantStateRules.allowed_record: Private interest until consent and official confirmation

participantStateRules.stop_condition: Underage or unclear record enters charter path

incidentCloseoutRows.response: Remove evidence and notify privacy reviewer
incidentCloseoutRows.closeout_evidence: Replacement screenshot uses fake ID only

incidentCloseoutRows.response: Remove access and review role matrix
Rotate link and notify affected participants
incidentCloseoutRows.closeout_evidence: Public page confirms link is private

incidentCloseoutRows.response: Remove file and move workflow external
incidentCloseoutRows.closeout_evidence: No official form remains in package

incidentCloseoutRows.response: Contain detail and limit to support role
incidentCloseoutRows.closeout_evidence: Access route and supporter role corrected

incidentCloseoutRows.response: Remove payment detail and separate finance workflow
Pause record use and confirm deletion or retention
Reconcile fake IDs and official count externally
Correct wording to proposed or in formation

officialHandoffRules.stop_condition: Receipt card or bank detail copied
Real slate published before official confirmation
